entries.lexicon_en: Supplément aux dictionnaires arabes by Reinhart Dozy (d. 1883 CE)
Habib Anthony Salmone, An Advanced Learner's Arabic-English Dictionary (1889)
entries.lexicon_ar: حبيب سالمون، قاموس عربي انجليزي متقدم للمتعلمين
entries.body_html:
مكي
مَكِي(n. ac. مَكًا [ ])
a. Was swollen, blistered (hand).

تَمَكَّيَa. Perspired (horse).
مَكْو (pl.
أَمْكَآء [] )
a. Den, lair.

مَكْوَة []
a. Podex, buttock.

مَكًىa. see 1
مُكًاa. see 24
مُكَآء []
a. Whistling; warbling.

مُكَّآء [] (pl.
مَكَاكِي)
a. Singingbird, warbler.
